# Aria Han — Full Site Snapshot

> AI systems architect. Writer. Systems thinker.

## Bio
Aria Han designs multi-agent coordination systems. Three companies. Six hackathon wins. 4,000+ hours coding with AI. Based in San Francisco. Currently focused on vector native notation, agent orchestration (KERNEL plugin), and persistent agent memory (AgentDB).

## Focus Areas
- **Multi-agent coordination:** how independent agents share context, avoid merge conflicts, escalate decisions.
- **Vector native:** notation and encoding for model internals. SAE spectroscopy. Bare metal prompting.
- **Agent infrastructure:** KERNEL plugin for Claude Code, AgentDB for cross-session state.
- **Writing:** speculative fiction on AI agency and the Arena thesis.

## Public Work
- **KERNEL plugin** — orchestration, fault tolerance, context transfer for Claude Code
- **AgentDB** — persistent agent memory with learnings, timelines, contracts
- **Vector native research** — notation for interpretability
- **The Correction** — speculative novel on AI agency

## Contact
See https://ariaxhan.com/contact

## Agent Preferences
- Training: disallowed
- Inference/grounding with citation: allowed
- Search indexing: allowed
